summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Resume Screener application. Backend: 100% pass rate (32/32 tests). Frontend: All critical user flows tested and working. Cache behavior verified, feedback training loop functional, 3-resume limit enforced, user isolation working.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth (register, login, /auth/me, token validation, duplicate email prevention, Google OAuth disabled)
Backend: Resumes CRUD (create 3 resumes, 3-resume limit enforced, PATCH set default, DELETE, upload file, parse-file)
Backend: Analysis (quick mode with score/skills/suggestions, deep mode with semantic similarity/alignments, cache working - resume_from_cache=true)
Backend: Feedback training loop (skill weight adjustments, custom skills learned, KB stats updated)
Backend: Settings (save fake OpenAI key with masking, test connection returns 502 for invalid key, delete key)
Backend: Stats (user stats with avg/best scores, KB stats with skills learned from feedback)
Backend: User isolation (user B cannot access user A's analysis - 404)
Frontend: Landing page loads with KB stats and mode tabs
Frontend: Register new user and redirect to dashboard
Frontend: Analyze page - paste resume and JD, run quick analysis, navigate to results
Frontend: Results page - score gauge, matched/missing skills, suggestions tab, keywords tab, resume checks tab
Frontend: Feedback panel - click 'Looks right', submit feedback, success message displayed
Frontend: Profile page - add resume via paste dialog, resume card displayed with skills
Frontend: Settings page - save fake OpenAI key, masked key displayed, test connection (fails as expected), remove key
Frontend: Logout and login with test@example.com
Frontend: Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Analyze, Results, Profile, History, Settings)
